sections.heading: When to use
sections.text: Use a single voltage-loop PI controller for buck converters when the plant is well damped and implementation simplicity matters. This is the default starting point for non-isolated buck regulation.

sections.heading: Escalation trigger
sections.text: Escalate to cascaded current-mode control when transient recovery is too slow, overshoot remains high after reasonable gain tuning, or output filtering needs stronger disturbance rejection.
